bug.description: redundant computation performing the same calculation multiple times unnecessarily

prompt:
There is a redundant computation performing the same calculation multiple times unnecessarily downstream of function ldpc_BG2_Zc176_byte in the openair1/PHY/CODING subsystem.
The function is located at openair1/PHY/CODING/nrLDPC_encoder/ldpc_BG2_Zc176_byte.c:3.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
